title: Capybara plush — head on, stuffing restored
description: The capybara came in with a loose head and torn fabric. We reattached the head, closed the cuts, deep cleaned, and restuffed for a plump finish.
itemDetails: Capybara plush toys are part of a recent animal-trend wave that gained strong popularity in the 2020s through social media and lifestyle gift channels. Many releases are contemporary novelty plush from Asian and global gift brands. Typical materials are polyester plush and fiber fill with simplified embroidered facial styling.
repairDetails: This capybara plush arrived with the head detached, cuts in the fabric, and compacted stuffing. We reattached the head, repaired all cuts and tears, deep cleaned, and restuffed for a round, even body.
